---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement for cozytempl
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Description

A clear and concise description of the problem you're trying to solve.

Example: "On a 500-app tenant, the app table's truncation banner kicks in
before I can find the app I want because the client-side filter only sees
the first 500 entries..."

## Proposed Solution

Describe the change you'd like to see. UI mockup, API sketch, or a
reference to a similar feature in another tool are all welcome.

## Alternatives Considered

Workarounds, partial fixes, or other approaches you already tried.

## Scope

- [ ] Frontend (templ / htmx / TypeScript)
- [ ] Backend handler / service (Go)
- [ ] Helm chart / deploy
- [ ] Docs / README / i18n
- [ ] CI / release / container image

## Use Case

Brief description of how you'd use the feature. Who is the audience?
What workflow does it unlock or accelerate?

## Environment (if relevant)

- **cozytempl version**: [e.g., 0.0.7]
- **Auth mode**: [passthrough / byok / impersonation-legacy / dev]
- **Deployment**: [homelab / MSP / cozystack upstream]
